message:
fix(output): correct lifetime annotations in abbreviation functions

- output/mod.rs: Change return type from &'static str to &'a str for
  abbreviate_key and abbreviate_classification functions to properly
  handle the case where input strings are returned unchanged

This fixes compilation errors introduced by the token-efficient output
module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
